input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.4.3
            TITLE: scoring term definitions:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.4.3: Scoring Term Definitions:
D.13.4.3 Scoring Term Definitions: 
• CO2 min  -  the smallest mass of CO2 used by any competitor who is eligible for Efficiency 
• CO2 your  -  the mass of CO2 used by the team being scored 
• Tmin  -  the lowest Endurance time of the fastest team which is eligible for Efficiency  
• Tyour  -  same as Endurance (D.12.13.1)  
• Lapyours   -  the number of laps driven by the team being scored 
• Laptotal Tmin and Latptotal CO2 min  -   be the number of laps completed by the teams 
which set Tmin and CO2min, respectively

final_answer: D.13.4.3 Scoring Term Definitions: • CO2 min - the smallest mass of CO2 used by any competitor who is eligible for Efficiency • CO2 your - the mass of CO2 used by the team being scored • Tmin - the lowest Endurance time of the fastest team which is eligible for Efficiency • Tyour - same as Endurance (D.12.13.1) • Lapyours - the number of laps driven by the team being scored • Laptotal Tmin and Latptotal CO2 min - be the number of laps completed by the teams which set Tmin and CO2min, respectively
